name: Responder
summary: Responder is an LLMNR, NBT-NS, and mDNS poisoner with built-in HTTP/SMB/MSSQL/FTP/LDAP rogue auth servers. Captures NetNTLMv1/v2 hashes, relays them, and supports WPAD poisoning.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
